Name: Bernhard
Description:
As of May 1, 2025, Bernhard is now ENFRA. While our name has changed, our leadership, ownership, and unwavering commitment to delivering trusted energy infrastructure solutions remain the same.

Follow our new LinkedIn page: @enfrasolutions

Name: FAYAT ENTREPRISE TP
Description: FAYAT ENTREPRISE TP, Filiale du groupe FAYAT, exerce son activité dans les  métiers des travaux publics : terrassement, hygiène publique, aménagement urbain, routes, Génie civil et dépollution. Depuis ses sites de Libourne,Floirac, Gaillan en Médoc (Gironde) et Aubiac (Lot et Garonne), elle se positionne comme une des entreprises de référence en Aquitaine.

Name: SEMI
Description:
Created in 1919, SEMI is a leading company in the electricity and industrial sector. Its name is synonym of tradition, experience, and future.
 
In the middle of its international expansion, the company is distinguished for its adapting capacity, typical of small and medium-sized companies; its company infrastructure, characteristic of a large-sized company; and the financial support of a consolidated firm.
 
SEMI, one of the main companies in the VINCI GROUP Industrial Services sector, is a renowned firm with its know-how as an added value.
 
The close cooperation with many Universities, as well as with public and private bodies in the development of new technologies has made our company earn the support from the sector for its innovation and viability.
 
Nowadays, SEMI has international subsidiaries rendering services at all levels. Settled in France, Germany, Romania, Morocco, Panama, Mexico, República Dominicana, Peru, El Salvador and Chile, the company also has collaborators in other countries such as Portugal, Israel, Nigeria, or Brazil.

Name: Anglian Water's @one Alliance
Description:
Anglian Water's @one Alliance is an integral part of the Anglian Water ecosystem, delivering complex projects across the Water and Water Recycling network. Comprising 8 industry-leading organisations, each contributing specialised expertise, @one efficiently manages over 40% of Anglian Water's capital delivery programme.

Our partners are Anglian Water Asset Delivery, Balfour Beatty, Barhale, Binnies, Mott MacDonald Bentley (MMB), SWECO, SKANSKA and MWH Treatment. Employees in the @one Alliance are employed across all our partner companies and work together to deliver complex programmes of work.

Following the successful delivery of £1.2bn during AMP7, the @one Alliance is now set to deliver approximately £3bn of vital work as part of Anglian Water’s £11bn AMP8 business plan, covering around 750 projects over the next five years.

Since our establishment in 2005, @one has grown to a team of over 1,300 employees. And with plans to welcome an additional 500 new team members over the next 12-18 months, the Alliance is set to expand even further.

If this interests you, then take a look at our jobs page to see the options available to you!

Name: CEBAT SpA
Description:
CEBAT SpA is a leader in utility networks’ development and services.
From High Voltage to Medium Voltage, fiber optics and water networks CEBAT SpA is the partner of choice of leading players like Terna, ENEL, Prysmian, ACEA and many Italian and foreign Renewables and Data Center developers.
At the heart of energy transition CEBAT SpA is a leader in High Voltage network undergrounding, Italian & international HVAC and HVDC  links construction, renewable grid infrastructure, smart grid deployment through Global Services and smart metering solutions.

Name: AQUATEC
Description:
Aquatec partners with Government, business and residential clients to deliver water, wastewater and odour control solutions for the long-term.

Aquatec's flexible product range adapts to individual project specifications, local Council and Water Authority requirements.

Product Range:
- Pump Stations (Fibreglass & Concrete)
- Pressure Sewer Systems
- Fibreglass (FRP) Maintenance Holes
- Fibreglass Storage Vessels
- Odour Control Systems
- Water Supply Systems
- Water & Wastewater Reuse
- Solids Handling Products

As an Australian-owned company with over 30 years of local and international experience, our service capabilities ensure that your asset is designed and delivered to exact specifications. Together with ongoing technical support, accredited training, auditing, and product warranties, Aquatec’s end-to‐end service model provides a superior level of risk management and quality control.

Name: Summit Line Construction
Description:
Building Today What Powers Tomorrow 

We reliably deliver electrical infrastructure with an unwavering commitment to safety, our people, customers, and communities.

Name: Rotaflow Fire Systems
Description:
As a premier full-service fire protection systems contractor, we offer comprehensive in-house engineering and fabrication capabilities. We specialize in risk assessment and mitigation planning, process safety engineering and design, as well as the installation, maintenance, and commissioning of fire alarm and suppression systems. Our expertise includes special hazards applications and fire water pump installations, adhering to ULC and NFPA standards.
Services include:
- Design, supply, installation, maintenance, and inspections of all types of fire protection systems, such as:
- Standard NFPA 13 Systems: wet systems, dry systems, pre-action systems
- Clean Agent Systems (NFPA 2001): NOVEC 1230 Systems, Water Mist Systems
- Water Spray Systems
- Fire Pump Installations (NFPA 20)
- Design, supply, installation, maintenance, and inspections of fire hydrants.
- Comprehensive inspections of fire protection systems, available annually, monthly, or even daily.
- Design, supply, installation, servicing, and inspections of fire alarm systems.

Name: Evac Group
Description:
Evac Group is a global leader in integrated water, waste and wastewater management solutions, as well as corrosion protection and marine growth prevention systems, for the marine, offshore and land-based construction industries. Guided by our promise Nothing to waste, we help customers cut waste, save water and lower emissions, supporting the shift toward more circular and sustainable operations.

Founded in 1979 and headquartered in Espoo, Finland, the company operates through offices in 13 countries across four continents and a network of representatives in more than 70 countries worldwide. In 2024, Evac generated revenue of approximately EUR 190 million and employed around 540 people.

Name: China Railway Construction Corporation (International) Limited, Agencia en Chile
Description: China Railway Construction Corporation, es una empresa estatal china con base en Beijing, es una empresa dedicada al desarrollo de proyectos de infraestructura a través de cuatro líneas de negocios principales: operaciones de construcción; actividades de estudio, diseño y consultoría; operaciones de fabricación; y otros negocios, los que incluyen logística y servicios inmobiliarios.

Name: Engetower
Description: A Engetower é uma empresa especializada no desenvolvimento de soluções e projetos de engenharia estrutural para os setores de transmissão e distribuição de energia elétrica. Nossa visão é promover o avanço tecnológico multidisciplinar do setor através de soluções inovadoras e parcerias estratégicas.

Name: Infravision
Description: Infravision is transforming how the world builds and maintains power grids. With its proprietary aerial robotics system, the company enables utilities, contractors, and developers to expand transmission and distribution infrastructure faster, safer, with lower environmental and community impact, and at significantly reduced costs. Operating globally, Infravision is helping meet the urgent demand for reliable and resilient grid infrastructure.

Name: Armoni Energia
Description:
A Armoni Energia é uma empresa comprometida em fornecer serviços de alta qualidade para clientes empresariais e corporativos, mais especificamente do ramo da indústria, serviços e energia elétrica.

Somos especialista no ramo da construção civil, infraestrutura e serviços.

Oferecemos soluções personalizadas, seguras e eficientes.

Name: Tanz Engenharia
Description: TANZ Engenharia: Building the Future with Innovation, Quality and Sustainability! Since 1999, we have been a reference in civil and structural engineering, with more than 20 thousand projects executed with excellence. At TANZ, we believe in the perfect combination of innovation, technical quality and a sustainable approach. Our passion is to provide innovative solutions to the telecommunications sector, always exceeding our customers' expectations and driving industry progress. We have built a solid reputation based on our credibility and delivery of high quality services. We are always ready to face challenges and adopt innovative ideas, technologies and approaches. Our dedicated team is committed to bringing the best to every project. We value sustainability and incorporate practices that minimize environmental impact and promote energy efficiency in all of our activities. If you are looking for reliable and innovative solutions in civil and structural engineering, count on us! We're here to make a difference in your next project. Contact us today and find out how we can help you build a bright future together! #Civil Engineering #Structural Engineering #Sustainability #Innovation Portfolio of more than 15,000 projects and structural reinforcement works.

Name: Infravision
Description:
Infravision’s aerial robotics platform is transforming how utilities and contractors construct and maintain transmission and distribution (T&D) infrastructure across a full suite of routine and emergent activities:

Drone-enabled power line stringing
Aerial heavy lifting and installations
Inspections and imaging

Innovated from the ground up as a safer and more efficient alternative to traditional stringing methods, Infravision’s proprietary system is accelerating grid buildout and boosting power reliability at an unmatched combination of cost, speed and safety.

Name: Águas do Pará
Description: Seremos responsáveis pelos serviços de água e esgotamento sanitário em 99 municípios do Pará

Name: FRTP Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes
Description:
La Fédération Régionale des Travaux Publics (FRTP) est le syndicat professionnel patronal régional des Travaux Publics, chargé de la défense des intérêts de ses membres, de la promotion constante de la profession, du développement en faveur de la formation des salariés et de l’emploi des jeunes.
Au quotidien, elle accompagne ses entreprises adhérentes sur les questions économiques, sociales, fiscales, juridiques, environnementales. 
Partenaire privilégié des maîtres d’ouvrage et maîtres d’œuvre, publics ou privés, la FRTP AURA se doit également d’être un acteur essentiel pour le développement des équipements et des infrastructures en Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes. 

Les Travaux Publics en Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes c’est :
	- 1 628 entreprises ayant leur siège dans la région, 
	- un chiffre d’affaires annuel de 6,8 milliards d’euros (2024)
	- 41 700 salariés permanents

Name: Tecmon
Description:
Em 16 de maio de 1997, o sonho do jovem engenheiro eletricista Klenyo Lucio da Silva, fez nascer a TECMON. Fundada com o objetivo de se tornar uma empresa de referência no ramo de montagens industriais.

  Ao longo do tempo, contando com tecnologias avançadas, empenho e muita paixão pelo trabalho, a empresa se consolidou como prestadora de diversos serviços como elétrica, automação, proteção e controle, montagem eletromecânica, hidráulica e obras civis em geral.

  Há mais de 26 anos, temos o compromisso de atuar com inovação, dedicação, respeito e valorização de nossos clientes e colaboradores.

  Toda a trajetória da Tecmon é marcada por valores que somados à sua proatividade e comprometimento na prestação de  serviços nas áreas técnica e comercial, fazem com que a empresa seja cada vez mais reconhecida por sua qualidade, dentro e fora do Brasil.

Name: Innova Energy
Description:
Somos uma empresa especializada no desenvolvimento de soluções integradas e inovadoras para o mercado de Energia, formada por profissionais com expertise para suprir as necessidades de seus clientes em diferentes necessidades e premissas. Nossa empresa foi fundada por Engenheiros Eletricista e Engenheiro Civil, com mais de mais de 18 anos de experiência adquirida em empresa Brasileira com atuação mundial e empresas multinacionais Francesa e Chinesa, lideres no segmento de energias renováveis e Transmissão de Energia no Brasil e na Europa.



Possuímos Know How em Gestão de Projetos multidisciplinares na modalidade EPC, gerenciando os projetos de nossos clientes referenciados na metodologia PMI e com profissional detentor de Certificação Internacional de Gerenciamento de Projetos – PMP (Project Management Professional). Contudo, disponibilizamos ao mercado a experiência da equipe Innova Ennergy para gerenciar com sucesso os empreendimentos de nossos clientes, focando na mitigação de riscos das suas mais variadas segmentações tais como prazo, custo, execução, etc.

Name: DATCO International ElectroMechanical Contracting LLC
Description: DATCO International Electromechanical Contracting LLC, a dynamic and steadily growing company offering specialized services in both MEP Contracting and Hard Facility Management (FM). We have proudly delivered successful projects across the United Arab Emirates since 2022, , building on our strong foundation in Saudi Arabia since 2002.

Name: Rockwell
Description: Trusted delivery partner for design, installation and commissioning of HVAC, utility pipework, E&I, and decarbonisation solutions across all industries.

Name: AIEM SRL
Description:
AIEM è protagonista sul mercato nazionale ed internazionale con una presenza trentennale nella realizzazione di sistemi tecnologici al servizio di clienti Pubblici e Privati in qualità di EPC Contractor attraverso le società controllate qualificata per l'esecuzione di lavori presso i maggiori Enti e Main Contractor raggiungendo l’obbiettivo di fornire al cliente finale soluzioni “chiavi in mano”. 

AIEM progetta processi e impianti innovativi, realizza in modo profittevole soluzioni impiantistiche e opere civili, offre attività di Facility Management e Servizi Energia, prendendosi cura del Cliente e delle sue esigenze, consapevole che il futuro è nella sua soddisfazione.

I principali campi di intervento risultano essere partendo dalla progettazione ingegneristica per la quale grazie a diverse partnership con primari società di ingegneria specializzate nel settore specifico riesce a sviluppare progetti innovativi ad alto contenuto tecnologico, passando per le fasi di construction, messa in esercizio e manutenzione sono costituiti da infrastrutture stradali e autostradali, gallerie ed opere d’arti di primaria importanza, Strutture Ospedaliere e Sanitarie, Strutture ricettive, Impianti di trattamento delle acque, Acquedotti, Telecomunicazioni, Telecontrollo, Impianti di Power Generation, Impianti fotovoltaici di notevoli dimensioni, Energie rinnovabili e non ultimo si distingue nel settore dell’Efficientamento energetico.

Name: Sources
Description:
Sources est une société Anonyme, indépendante, prospère, en croissance constante et maîtrisée. 

Sources s'est tout d'abord fait connaitre par sa capacité à concevoir de grandes unités de traitement des eaux, autant en stations d'épuration qu'en stations de traitement des eaux potables. 

Depuis 2006, Sources a cependant diversifié son champ d'action vers la livraison de stations clés en mains de 1000 à 500 000 EH, et d'usines de production d'eau potable de 10 à 2 000 m3/h.

Avec un chiffre d'affaires (part équipement) de près de 40 M€ en 2021, représentant un montant d'activité chantier de plus de 100M€, Sources se place désormais dans le Top 4 des constructeurs français.

Sources gère aujourd’hui une cinquantaine de chantiers par an, sur toute la France avec un réseau régional de plus en plus dense, et à l'international avec des implantations locales dans plusieurs pays, notamment au Maghreb.

A ce jour, Sources a conçu ou livré plusieurs centaines d'usines, autant pour le traitement de l'eau potable que pour le traitement des eaux résiduaires, fonctionnant toutes à la satisfaction des Maîtres d'Ouvrage. 

L'équipe Sources, présente à travers un réseau d'implantations, densifié chaque année, maîtrise l'ensemble de la chaîne de production mais développe aussi de nombreuses innovations grâce à sa Direction Recherche et Développement. Ainsi de nombreux brevets ont été déposés depuis les débuts de Sources.

Name: Novo Serviços de Engenharia
Description:
Somos uma empresa independente de engenharia consultiva que
oferece serviços especializados nas áreas de energia e infraestrutura. Fundada em 2018, a partir da experiência de mais de 30 anos de seus sócios no setor, participamos desde o desenvolvimento de projetos, gerenciamento e construção.

Também atuamos nas áreas de eficiência energética, transporte, desenvolvimento urbano, recursos hídricos e industrial.

WE ARE NOVO!
We are an independent consulting engineering and construction company offering specialized services into the energy field.

Founded in 2018, Novo Engenharia stands out for having a broad multidisciplinary team with experience in the electrical sector. We also participated in the creation of the project, development, management and construction. In addition, we operate in the areas of energy and industrial efficiency, transport, and water resources.

Name: DELPRO A/S
Description:
DELPRO A/S is one of the leading Danish partners and suppliers in the market for construction tasks related to the transmission and distribution of electrical energy and data.
We are nationwide with headquarters located in Vamdrup near Kolding plus offices in Poland, The Netherlands and the UK. The company employs approximately 220 employees.

We perform service and contracts within: 
• Transformer and switching stations
• On- and offshore wind farms
• Overhead lines
• CHP plants
• Industrial power plants
• Cable systems

Our main activities are related to electrical installations between 10 kV and 400 kV.

On construction projects, we handle all aspects of assembly, installation, testing and commissioning of the installation. For construction work, we use subcontractors, which we are happy to manage.

During servicing of the systems, we will carry out preventive maintenance, troubleshooting and repairs to ensure high availability. At DELPRO we are always ready to move out, and we know the importance of being available when the need is there.

Customers:
• Electricity grid and transmission companies
• Wind turbine owners and developers 
• Power plants and combined heat and power plants
• Component suppliers
•Industries

Safety first:
At DELPRO, we take care of our employees and we put safety first. On larger construction projects we give high priority to having safety coordinated between all the companies involved.

Name: Sustainability Partners LLC
Description:
Sustainability Partners, LLC (SP) is a Public Benefit Company that forms enduring partnerships with public entities for the advancement of their essential infrastructure. SP converts infrastructure to a monthly usage-based service with its utility-like model, Infrastructure as a Service. 

SP offers any combination of funding, including supplementary and match funding for state and federal grants, in addition to project facilitation and ongoing care. We partner with state agencies, municipalities, schools, universities, hospitals, HOAs, ports and other durable entities to keep essential infrastructure reliable, safe, and improving forever.

Sustainability Partners’ core business is sustainability. The company reduces the environmental impact and general inefficiencies of old, inefficient, and costly infrastructure by replacing it with newer, cleaner, more efficient, and longer-lasting solutions. 

For more information, visit our website at www.sustainability.partners

Name: DETech Contracting LLC.
Description:
Detech Contracting LLC | Engineering Excellence & Innovation

Detech Contracting LLC is a leading infrastructure and construction company dedicated to delivering high-quality, innovative, and sustainable engineering solutions across the UAE. With a strong reputation for excellence, we specialize in:

 Microtunneling & Piling – Advanced trenchless technology for efficient underground infrastructure.
 Stormwater, Irrigation & Sewerage Networks – Comprehensive solutions for  Irrigation, stormwater, and sewage pipelines.
 Utility Infrastructure – Power, water, and telecom networks supporting urban development.
 Road & Civil Works – High-quality road construction and maintenance.

 Commitment to Excellence: Our team of expert engineers, project managers, and skilled workforce ensures timely and cost-effective project execution, meeting and exceeding industry standards.

 Trusted by Clients: We are proud partners with Dubai Municipality, DEWA, RTA, and leading developers, shaping the future of infrastructure in the region.

 Innovation & Sustainability: Leveraging the latest technology and sustainable practices, we drive efficiency and minimize environmental impact.

At Detech Contracting LLC, we don’t just build infrastructure – we build the future.

 Connect with us to explore collaboration opportunities and groundbreaking solutions!

Name: MADONU
Description:
Construcciones MADONU  nace en el año 2004, con el objetivo de convertirse en una referencia en el mundo de la construcción.

Contamos con un equipo técnico excepcional, con enorme experiencia en todos los campos de la construcción civil, que dan seguimiento a todas nuestras obras y logran activar los mejores sistemas y los más funcionales para cada obra.

El motor de nuestra empresa es el personal de obra. Nuestros encargados tienen una dilatada experiencia internacional y han trabajado con infinitos sistemas de encofrado.

Somos especialistas en ejecución de viaductos, de cualquier tipología y con los siguientes métodos constructivos: Autocimbra, Voladizos sucesivos, Lanzador de Vigas, Cimbras Porticadas y Cimbras Cuajadas.

Otra de nuestras especialidades es la ejecución de Revestimiento de Túneles, hemos ejecutado cientos de kilómetros en los últimos años. Contamos con encofrados y sistemas propios de diferentes dimensiones para poder abordar cualquier obra que se presente.

La ejecución de Pilas, mediante sistema de trepas, también es, sin duda, uno de nuestros principales valores, logrando alcanzar objetivos de planificación, realmente complicados, optimizando recursos e intentado innovar obra tras obra.

Complementamos nuestras especialidades con trabajos en Pasos Superiores e Inferiores, Naves Industriales, etc, dando siempre unos rendimientos óptimos y ayudando a nuestros clientes a conseguir sus objetivos.

Construcciones MADONU se adapta a cualquier tipo de obra. Optando por elegir el sistema de ejecución que mejor se adecua a las características de cada obra. Contamos con nuestro equipo técnico y la colaboración de las principales ingenierías, para desarrollar de manera común, sistemas de encofrado que simplifiquen y mejoren la Seguridad, la Calidad y el Tiempo de Ejecución de la obra.

Name: United Utility
Description:
United Utility provides comprehensive and innovative offerings supporting power infrastructure investment across all transmission, substation, distribution, and grid hardening projects, from engineering and construction to maintenance, live-line work, and storm response, making us one of the top 10 specialty contracting firms serving the electric utility market.

We’re committed to expanding opportunities, fueling growth and creating value for those we serve. And our relationships – with customers, communities, investors and our partner companies – are grounded in rock-solid integrity.

United Utility is the parent company to industry-leading utility service contractors W.A. Chester, B&B Electrical & Utility Contractors, Williams Electric Company, United Utility Power Services, D&D Power, Coastal Electrical Construction, Plaska Transmission Line, and DBE Utility Services. United Utility is also a minority investor in E.P. Breaux Utility Services.

Name: Leroux & Lotz Technologies (LLT)
Description:
Leroux & Lotz Technologies, a recognised expert in industrial boilers and combustion systems, offers tailor-made solutions for all types of biomass, cogeneration and incineration applications, as well as maintenance and refurbishment or complete rebuild services. 

In our pursuit of excellence, we are looking for talent to tackle the industrial, energy and environmental challenges of tomorrow. 

Leroux & Lotz Technologies looks back on more than half a century of success and technological innovation, with three sites in France (Nantes, Paris and Grenoble), but above all, it is a company on a human scale, made up of passionate employees.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Leroux & Lotz Technologies is part of the Altawest group, which builds equipment and provides services for the production and conversion of energy.

Name: Westland Infra
Description:
Als netbeheerder beheert Westland Infra de technische hoogwaardige energienetten die - letterlijk - de wortels vormen van het Westland. Niet voor niets is de regio Westland ver buiten onze landgrenzen bekend als de tuin van Europa.

Westland Infra beschikt over een unieke marktpositie door de grote kennis van het tuinbouwsegment en haar specifieke (energie)behoeften. Als partner van de glastuinbouw ondersteunen wij de energietransitie. Duurzaamheid voorop!

Name: EDS Infrastrutture S.p.A.
Description: MONTAGGIO DI IMPIANTI TECNICI, COSTRUZIONI EDILI, STRADALI, IDRAULICHE FERROVIARIE, MARITTIME, GALLERIE, PONTI, FORESTALI, FOGNATURE, PORTUALI, ACQUEDOTTI, IMPIANTI DI PRODUZIONE, TRASPORTO, DISTRIBUZIONE E UTILIZZAZIONE DELL ENERGIA ELETTRICA,TELECOMUNICAZIONI.

Name: Visit Italy
Description:
Visit Italy è la piattaforma culturale indipendente che racconta l’Italia lontano dai riflettori, con progetti e contenuti che trasformano la percezione dei territori.

Dal 2016 lavoriamo per costruire una nuova visione dell’Italia: più autentica, più profonda, più connessa alle comunità locali. Raccontiamo i luoghi attraverso lo sguardo di chi li vive ogni giorno, valorizzando la cultura, la natura, l’identità e il senso profondo del viaggio.

Con una community di oltre 4,1 milioni di viaggiatori, Visit Italy è oggi il punto di riferimento per enti, destinazioni e brand che vogliono comunicare in modo strategico, credibile e contemporaneo.

Ogni progetto nasce per generare impatto culturale, occupazione locale e un’integrazione autentica tra residenti e visitatori. Non realizziamo iniziative isolate, ma costruiamo narrazioni coerenti, sistemi territoriali, immaginari condivisi.

Siamo convinti che il turismo non debba essere solo promozione, ma cultura applicata. Per questo accompagniamo territori e istituzioni in un percorso di posizionamento che unisce visione, strategia e contenuto.

Abbiamo lavorato con decine di comuni, regioni e consorzi turistici in tutta Italia, contribuendo a ridare voce a territori spesso ignorati dai grandi flussi, ma ricchi di valore e potenziale.

Visit Italy è un progetto editoriale, strategico e culturale che unisce comunicazione e identità. Per cambiare, davvero, il modo di vedere l’Italia.

Name: TM.E. S.p.A. - Termomeccanica Ecologia
Description:
Design, project management, supply, construction, commissioning and service of complete facilities, or their parts, for waste treatment with energy production, for water treatment for both civil and industrial sectors, for the production and / or treatment of chemical compounds and for the treatment of effluents from industrial / civil processes.

Progettazione, project management, fornitura, costruzione, messa in servizio e assistenza di impianti chiavi in mano, o parti di essi, per il trattamento dei rifiuti e la produzione di energia e per il trattamento delle acque, destinati a settori civili e industriali, per la produzione e/o il trattamento di composti chimici nel settore industriale e per il trattamento di effluenti da processi industriali/civili.

Name: Ghm
Description:
Firmly established in the Grand-Est region since its creation in 1837, GHM-ECLATEC is a local group with a global reach.

Its area of expertise today is lighting and urban furniture solutions, with products that have established themselves in several highly competitive export markets.

As a designer, manufacturer and French leader in lighting, GHM-ECLATEC has mastered the art of light and its applications in both urban and rural contexts, in a creative and well thought-out approach.

The group is a formidable creative force and its history is rich with prestigious heritage projects (Guimard metro entrances, Wallace fountain, Candelabras on the Champs-Elysées) and contemporary projects. 

Its intelligent lighting management solutions, smartlighting, generate significant energy savings while preserving the values of safety for users of public spaces, enhancement of heritage and respect for biodiversity. 

GHM-ECLATEC's value proposition can be summarized as innovative solutions for local authorities that contribute to improving energy efficiency, safety and the quality of life of citizens.

Name: S&N Infrastructure
Description: S&N Communications, Inc was founded in 1977 by Crawford Smith and Wayne Newkirk and incorporated in 1978. The original S&N philosophy of Doing Things Right the First Time with integrity has carried forward to the “We’ve Got This” philosophy by our Chairman, Allen Powell. So, what does “We’ve Got This” mean for our customers? Peace of mind. It means managing a single resource versus coordinating among multiple vendors. It means knowing that no matter the stage of your project, it’s in the hands of seasoned professionals who take pride in their work.

Name: Ambiental Crato
Première Engenharia
Description: A Première Engenharia elabora projetos para a construção civil e é especializada em projetos de instalações prediais em BIM. Tratamos todo projeto como único e buscamos as soluções integradas e inteligentes para cada, sempre atentos ao que há de melhor e mais novo no mercado. Valorizamos nossos colaboradores e prezamos o comprometimento com os nossos clientes.

Name: SINICON | Sindicato Nacional
Description:
Fundado em 1959, com escritório no Rio de Janeiro, Brasília, Salvador, Goiânia e Recife, possui representantes junto às Federações das Indústrias em diversos Estados.

Mais do que uma entidade de classe, o SINICON é instrumento fundamental na representação das empresas que operam no setor e que exercem um importante papel na consolidação e expansão da infraestrutura física do País.

A atividade da Construção Pesada-Infraestrutura — CNAE 42 e 43, responde por significativa parcela do Produto Interno Bruto (PIB). Constitui um dos mais importantes segmentos empresariais brasileiros, fomentador de tecnologia, exportador de serviços e gerador de milhões de empregos.

O SINICON possui expertise e um importante histórico no diálogo com entidades representantes de trabalhadores, em negociações coletivas de trabalho, na prestação de apoio relacionado a interação de empresas e trabalhadores, sobretudo pelas prerrogativas que detém e pela presença em diferentes Unidades da Federação.

O SINICON detém a faculdade da representação judicial e extrajudicial de suas Associadas. Name: Rendesco
Description:
Rendesco is the UK’s leading clean energy tech developer and operator, focusing on the electrification of heat using heat pumps and heat networks to decarbonise Britain’s buildings.

We design, install, and manage clean heat solutions which transfer heat from below the surface of the Earth to provide homes and buildings with sustainable heat and hot water. We currently own and manage over 70 ground source networks and provide heat to more than 3,000 homes in the UK.

Since launching in 2012, we have developed a unique and highly efficient solution for decarbonising homes and buildings. Each property we serve saves 18 tonnes of Co2 compared to a gas boiler and three tonnes of Co2 compared to an air source heat pump.

We have curated a team of 30 highly-technical experts, merging experience from the investment, property, construction and renewable energy industries to create a unique business model and deliver a solution to the UK’s clean heat challenge. Heat networks need technical know-how and we have the most experience - and the best reputation - in the UK.

Name: EnerGrid
Description:
EnerGrid is committed to leading India’s Energy Transition by playing a crucial role in building critical Infrastructure for the nation’s renewable energy and net zero goals. It focuses on developing critical projects, including large-scale power transmission systems, utility-scale Battery Energy Storage Systems (BESS), and Renewable Energy (RE) projects. These initiatives will strengthen the national grid, ensure a seamless energy transition, and optimize solar, wind, and other renewables for a more sustainable future.

EnerGrid draws strength from its co-sponsors - IndiGrid, British International Investment (BII), and the Norwegian Climate Investment Fund (Norfund). Backed by their operational expertise, strong governance, ESG focus, and robust financial support, EnerGrid is poised for sustainable growth. The three partners have committed USD 300 million equity capital, reinforcing their dedication to India’s energy transition.

EnerGrid’s strategic vision aligns with India's ambitious energy targets, including achieving 500 GW of RE capacity by 2030. To support this goal, the company is driving large-scale RE projects, deploying advanced BESS solutions to integrate renewable power with storage, and investing in modern transmission networks. These efforts will help meet the growing energy demand while ensuring economic development.

India’s energy sector presents immense opportunities, with an expected investment of INR 9.15 lakh crores (~USD 105 billion) required to enhance infrastructure and meet a projected demand of 458 GW by 2032. Technological advancements in energy storage will play a key role in transforming the sector, improving grid stability, and enabling greater RE integration. 

Positioned at the forefront of this transformation, EnerGrid is dedicated to accelerating India’s transition to a cleaner, more sustainable, and resilient energy future.

Name: GREEN BRIDGE PARTNERS
Description:
Green Bridge Partners (GBP) is a US-based Climate Tech Company specializing in assisting companies in accelerating their transitions to renewable energy from fossil fuel-based energy sources. GBP utilizes an innovative new business model to speed up this transition by a factor of 3X while minimizing the cost and complexity of this process for the energy user. The unique new approach utilized by GBP takes all the hassle away from the energy user client and passes on the details of this complex task to the experienced team at GBP and their industry partners.

GBP provides a complete “turn-key” solution process from start to finish, including the initial project setup, which typically involves a renewable energy-producing system and an adjacent energy storage system to facilitate 24/7/365 power operations for the client, as well as complete expert management and integration of the two systems throughout the life span of the proposed energy production/storage/management solution. The client can choose to be connected to the existing grid infrastructure or wholly detached and independent of it with the knowledge that they are entirely self-sufficient and relatively immune to global climate change.

Description: Creating real change quickly at a country level can happen when decision makers lead it. Throughout the various African countries, the desire to invest resources in establishing an advanced medical system for all strata of the population leads them to the Ovadia group, which has been proving itself for two decades in initiating and establishing some of the most advanced medical facilities in the world. The fruitful cooperation between the administration and the group of its employees, which is particularly attentive to the needs coming from the field - helps in removing various barriers, enables rapid progress, relatively and in providing a life-saving response. Establishing health infrastructures The focus of the Ovadia group was and remains the accessibility of advanced medical services in the places that need it the most - third world countries. These areas are poverty-stricken and the world closes its eyes to the great distress and leaves them at the bottom of its priorities. For this, a 360° envelope is required in everything involved in the establishment of medical facilities - from initiation to the actual provision of the service. The Ovadia Group makes sure to purchase most of the required equipment from the State of Israel and creates jobs for Israeli personnel as part of its services for the establishment needs. The unique fingerprint of the Ovadia group of employees is reflected in the fact that no one hospital is similar to another - each hospital is characterized by its own uniqueness - such as specializing in children or emphasizing rehabilitation, and accordingly the hospital is also equipped with the advanced technology required for this. Health, saving lives and global equality So far, the Ovadia group has been privileged to lead the establishment of 8 hospitals in Equatorial Guinea and in the middle of 2022 has committed to building 5 hospitals at once throughout Morocco. The construction should be completed during the year 2025.

Description:
Das Startup Dinser Expertise GmbH hat sich darauf spezialisiert, im Rahmen von Infrastrukturprojekten Varianten zu prüfen und Interessenabwägungen zu erarbeiten. 

Wer ein Infrastrukturvorhaben plant, weiss: Die Herausforderungen wachsen stetig. Denn die technische Realisierung wird immer anspruchsvoller, der verfügbare Raum ist knapp, und die Ansprüche der Beteiligten sind hoch. In dieser Situation erweisen sich Variantenanalysen und Interessenabwägungen als das geeignete Mittel, zeitgerecht die gewünschte Plangenehmigung zu erhalten – zumal das Bundesgericht längst in mehreren Urteilen festgehalten hat, dass bei umweltrelevanten Grossvorhaben eine Pflicht zur hinreichenden Variantenprüfung besteht.

Hier setzen wir ein: Wir analysieren Bauvorhaben auf ihre Genehmigungsfähigkeit, beraten unsere Kunden hinsichtlich der Variantenprüfung und wägen die Interessen der Projektbeteiligten ab.

Unser Ziel: Wer mit uns plant, soll rasch zur Plangenehmigung gelangen. Und zwar für ganz unterschiedliche Infrastrukturanlagen wie etwa Stromnetze, Anlagen für die erneuerbare Energieproduktion, Fernwärmeanlagen, Eisenbahnnetze und Bergbahnen.

Description:
La Cospin Srl è un'azienda leader nel settore del consolidamento e restauro di edifici storici, nonché nella realizzazione di opere infrastrutturali. L'azienda è dotata di tutte le certificazioni di qualità e le qualificazioni SOA necessarie per la realizzazione di opere pubbliche, il che testimonia la sua capacità imprenditoriale e la sua alta qualità e professionalità. Inoltre, la Cospin Srl è in grado di gestire appalti integrati, che richiedono non solo la realizzazione dell'opera, ma anche la progettazione esecutiva, dimostrando la sua competenza e conoscenza del settore.
La Cospin Srl dedica particolare attenzione alla sicurezza in fase esecutiva, garantendo la salute e la sicurezza dei propri dipendenti e dei lavoratori del cantiere. Inoltre, l'azienda si impegna costantemente a ridurre l'impatto ambientale dei suoi lavori, utilizzando le più recenti tecniche costruttive e le tecnologie più avanzate per realizzare opere a basso impatto ambientale e alta efficienza energetica.
La pianificazione e il controllo scrupoloso di ogni fase dei lavori sono una priorità assoluta per la Cospin Srl, al fine di garantire la qualità e il rispetto delle previsioni di tempi e costi di progetto. Ciò dimostra la sua competenza e professionalità nel settore.
Infine, l'attenzione dell'azienda alla formazione continua del proprio personale e alla ricerca di nuove soluzioni tecniche e costruttive rappresenta un valore aggiunto per i propri clienti.

Name: Komunalno podjetje Velenje
Description:
Supply of municipal waste and rainwater to residents and industry (supply of heat, district cooling, drinking water, discharge and treatment of urban waste and rainwater and disposal of non-hazardous and inert waste, funeral burial activities and expanding accessibility to municipal goods and services by networking in the Municipality of Velenje, municipality Šoštanj and Municipality Šmartno ob Paki and parts of neighbouring municipalities.

The energy infrastructure of the heat distribution system is owned by Velenje Municipality and Šoštanj Municipality and is contractually managed by the  Komunalno podjetje Velenje, d. o. o. (Public utility company of Velenje).
The district heating system (DHS) of the Šaleška Valley is supplied from Šoštanj Power Plant
(TEŠ), with lignite from Premogovnik Velenje (PV) used as TEŠ’s energy source. The future 
transformation and condition of the DHS in Šaleška valley will be based the adopted national strategy for exiting coal (2033 being the final year of TEŠ’s operation), therefore, accelerated planning and decision making will be needed in the following years to ensure that a new design of DHS will be based on alternative and cleaner generation sources of thermal energy, and that required levels of reliability and affordability of heat supply for more than 30 thousand residents in Velenje Municipality and Šoštanj Municipality and industrial sector within the Šaleška valley will be achieved.
Ensuring a reliable and sustainable supply of heat is one of the key pillars of a just transition towards a carbon-free society. In the proposed Action Plan, a transition towards a coalindependent, affordable and environmentally neutral district heating system in the Šaleška Valley is proposed.
A key measure will also be to reduce the heat demand of end-users, which will increase the overall efficiency of the system, ensuring a sustainable heat price, and thus also restoring peoples' reputation and trust in our district heating system.

Name: Société d'études, travaux, équipement et maintenance
Description:
SETEM (Société d’Étude, Travaux, Équipement et Maintenance) est une entreprise spécialisée dans la construction des stations de pompage et l’équipement des stations d’épuration. Depuis sa création en 2007, elle s’est imposée comme une référence nationale, accompagnant les secteurs industriels, environnementaux et publics avec des projets clé en main, garantissant des solutions sur mesure, fiables et durables.

Son expertise s’étend également au domaine de l’eau potable, garantissant des infrastructures performantes et adaptées aux besoins des collectivités et des industriels.

Grâce à une approche intégrée, SETEM prend en charge l’ensemble du processus : de la conception des infrastructures hydrauliques à la fourniture d’équipements électromécaniques et mécano-soudés, en passant par l’installation, la mise en service et la maintenance. Nos projets clé en main assurent des solutions complètes, optimisées et adaptées aux exigences du marché.

En constante évolution, SETEM continue de se développer pour proposer des innovations et relever les défis du secteur hydraulique.

Vous êtes passionné par l’hydraulique et l’environnement ? Vous souhaitez intégrer une entreprise en pleine croissance qui valorise l’expertise et l’innovation ? SETEM vous offre des opportunités de carrière stimulantes et un environnement dynamique. Contactez-nous dès maintenant !

Name: Customized Drilling Services Pty Ltd

Customized Drilling Services
Founded in 2000 is a Brisbane based civil construction contractor specialising in Horizontal Directional Drilling (HDD) trenchless solutions and pipeline infrastructure installation methods. We would be pleased to accommodate your requirements and look forward to hearing from you.

Name: Omnidrill
Description:
At Omnidrill, our mission is to connect people and resources by delivering affordable, sustainable underground infrastructure solutions.

As a forward-thinking engineering company, we specialize in designing and building innovative robotic tool kits for the often-overlooked underground sector. Our solutions provide reliable, effective utility implementation with minimal surface disruption, offering protection and sustainability.

Our technology is not just Earth-focused—it's built for the future, including potential Moon and Mars missions. By creating robotic systems that access subsurface environments, we contribute to humanity’s efforts in space exploration. This dual-use approach is also revolutionizing the drilling industry here on Earth.

We focus on autonomous and robotic capabilities for underground applications like horizontal drilling and piping. We are developing groundbreaking boring methods and innovative ways to perform underground activities.

Currently, we're focused on designing and manufacturing a new rock-drilling machine, targeting small-diameter trenchless utilities (0.3-1.2m). As we grow, we are committed to expanding our underground capabilities and delivering even more advanced engineering solutions.


We’re looking for:
- Partners to help us push boundaries
- Individuals driven by curiosity, imagination, and determination
- Investors who bring time, capital, and wisdom
- Engineers, visionaries, and pioneers ready to join a groundbreaking team

From long-haul fiber routes and Optical Fiber Cable (OFC) rollouts, to last-mile FTTH deployments and trenchless solutions, RAANCOM combines deep field experience, technical expertise and unwavering commitment, to deliver quality, timely solutions.

Whether you're upgrading your utility infrastructure, expanding your fiber footprint, or launching greenfield projects, RAANCOM is your trusted on-ground partner.

Key Achievements:
•	Delivered 11,500+ km of utility infrastructure, including 3,800+ km of OFC.
•	Connected 300,000+ homes in Bengaluru through FTTH.
•	Trusted partner to Reliance Jio, Airtel, Vodafone, Tata Communications & BSNL.
•	Delivered across national long-distance corridors.
•	Achieved over 1km of OFC per day, across complex urban terrains.

Core Services:
•	Turnkey Fiber Optic Infrastructure: Long-haul, metro & FTTH networks.
•	Underground Utility Construction: HDD, trenching, ducting, restoration.
•	Project Management & Multi-Agency Coordination: End-to-end project delivery.
•	GIS-Integrated Engineering Solutions: Network design & drafting.
•	Aerial Network Construction: Precision installation.

Why RAANCOM:
 Precision-driven execution.
 Expertise in complex urban environments.
 Legacy leadership with global standards.
 Culture of safety and compliance.
 In-house PMO and GIS-led project governance.

Name: SNPDRI Philippines Corporation
Description:
SPIC（State Power Investment Corporation） ranked 260th among the Fortune Global 500 in 2022 with its businesses covering 46 countries and regions. SPIC has 130,000 employees and 62 subsidiary entities. Its business covers electricity, heat, coal, aluminum, logistics, finance, environmental protection, photovoltaic, and power station services, including all types of power generation kinds, such as nuclear power, thermal power, hydropower, wind power, and photovoltaic power.

Established in 1958, SNPDRI (State Nuclear Electric Power Planning Design & Research Institute Co., Ltd.) is a wholly-owned secondary enterprise of SPIC, which has been selected as one of the "Top 60 ENR Chinese Engineering Design Enterprises". It provides services in nine fields including planning, consulting, evaluation, strategic research, scientific and technological innovation, product research and development, business model, whole-process consultation +EPC, investment, and financing.

SNPDRI Philippines Corporation is a wholly owned subsidiary of SNPDRI. Its business scope includes design、consulting and general contracting of transmission lines, substations, and renewable energy. Since its establishment in Manila, the Philippines in 2013, it has contracted four general contracting projects with a total contract value of over 9 billion pesos. Among them, the Manila (Navotas) 230kV Substation Project and Pagbilao 500kV Substation Project have entered the project acceptance stage and won the high recognition of their owners, the NGCP (National Grid Corporation of the Philippines). Abuyog 230kV Substation Project and Taguig-Baras Transmission Line Project will be started soon. In the future, with the strong support of the parent company SNPDRI and the SPIC Group, the Philippine company plans to expand its business into new areas, including wind power, photovoltaic, energy storage, and smart energy, as well as into the Southeast Asian market.

Name: BONSBAK INC
Description:
**About Bonsbak Inc.**

Founded in 2003 by Paul and Bonnie Maher in Truxton, New York, Bonsbak Inc. is a leader in the telecommunications utility field, specializing in directional drilling and cable plowing. Born from a commitment to quality, Bonsbak Inc. has grown from a small family business into a respected company known for its expertise and dedication to getting the job done right the first time.

Paul Maher, a second-generation professional with over 40 years of experience in underground utility and excavation work, has driven Bonsbak Inc.'s success. His deep understanding of the industry and commitment to excellence, combined with Bonnie Maher's focus on customer satisfaction and business development, have established Bonsbak Inc. as a trusted name.

Bonsbak Inc. specializes in directional drilling—installing underground utilities with minimal surface disruption—and cable plowing, which efficiently lays cables for large-scale fiber builds. These methods are critical for both urban areas with existing infrastructure and remote rural locations. The company also offers services such as building retaining walls, site preparation, and excavation, allowing it to handle diverse and complex projects.

Quality is Bonsbak Inc.'s standard. The company consistently exceeds client expectations by delivering projects on time, within budget, and to the highest safety and environmental standards. Its skilled team employs cutting-edge technology and innovative techniques to ensure precision and minimize disruptions.

Innovation is at the core of Bonsbak Inc.'s operations. The company invests in the latest equipment, like dozer cable plows and GPS technology, to improve efficiency and accuracy. This forward-thinking approach has kept Bonsbak Inc. at the forefront of the industry.

Bonsbak Inc. also prioritizes safety, maintaining a rigorous safety protocol and an excellent safety record. Clients trust Bonsbak Inc. to manage projects with care.

Atuamos em parceria com operadoras, integradoras e empresas do setor, oferecendo mão de obra qualificada e soluções técnicas personalizadas para projetos de backbone, rede de acesso, instalação e manutenção.

Name: Jubilee Transmission
Description:
Founded by experienced energy infrastructure developers to address needed grid upgrades, Jubilee Energy works tirelessly to relieve transmission congestion that prevents energy customers from taking full advantage of more modern and cost-effective energy resources.

The US has more than 2 million megawatts of wind, solar and storage capacity stuck in interconnection queues, seeking grid access. As renewable penetration and power demand increases, utilities need to link solar, wind, and hydro resource areas with new transmission lines in order for them to replicate legacy fossil systems.

•	Specializes in water treatment construction, operations, and maintenance, energy and water efficiency evaluation, water asset management, water reliability studies, and other water treatment systems.

•	Offers design and build projects for water treatment plant facility e.g., reverse osmosis water treatment plant, desalination water treatment plant, minimal water treatment plant, ultra and nano filtration water treatment, and wastewater treatment plant.
•	Offers watermain design and construction of water distribution lines in residential and community projects.
•	Offers Water Treatment Plant design and construction of drinking water treatment facilities and wastewater treatment plant facilities.
•	Offers water filtration improvements on existing facility to develop a long-term water supply system plan and integrate the overall site layout, building facilities, and various equipment components into the final design and operating water filtration facility.
•	Offers design and build of water booster stations to improve the current and future capacity of the station, as well as identify alternatives for system operation to mitigate excessive pump cycling and pressure surges.
•	Offers design and construction of water storage tanks with appropriate sizing, elevation, and location relative to water supply based on the population demand.
•	Offers services in water system reliability studies and associated maps in source water protection systems and security planning that would be useful for our client’s long-term planning and budgeting.

Il nostro impegno è contribuire a un futuro sostenibile, dove l'acqua non è solo una risorsa, ma un diritto accessibile a tutti. Puntiamo a migliorare l'efficienza idrica, ridurre l’impatto ambientale e promuovere tecnologie all'avanguardia per una gestione intelligente delle risorse.

 I nostri servizi
Ci occupiamo di ogni aspetto del ciclo idrico, offrendo:

Progettazione integrata per infrastrutture idriche avanzate;
Gestione e manutenzione integrata degli impianti;
Costruzione di infrastrutture idriche per uso civile e industriale.
 Dove siamo
La nostra sede principale si trova a Jerzu (NU), ma il nostro approccio e le nostre soluzioni hanno un impatto globale. Collaboriamo con comunità e partner ovunque vi sia bisogno di innovare nel ciclo idrico.

 Lavora con noi
Siamo sempre alla ricerca di talenti che condividano la nostra passione per l’innovazione e la sostenibilità. Esplora le nostre opportunità di carriera sulla sezione "Lavora con noi" su LinkedIn e unisciti al nostro team per fare la differenza.

 Contattaci
Siamo pronti a collaborare con clienti, partner e professionisti che condividono la nostra visione. Scrivici a info@a2owater.it

Rooted in military service and driven by discipline, Vector Force Development is a Service-Disabled Veteran Owned Business (SDVOB) providing opportunities for veterans to excel in the energy industry.  Through a steadfast commitment to safety, quality, and the communities we serve, we provide ancillary construction support services (underground utilities inspection, traffic control, and hydro excavation) to the energy and utilities industries while simultaneously providing workforce and human capital solutions to our partners and customers across a myriad of industries ranging from entry-level to C-suite executives. 
 
By leveraging our vast network of national, state, local, and veteran and workforce organizations, we are strategically positioned to source talent and provide solutions through Recruitment Placement Outsourcing (RPO), Direct Placement, Retained Search, and contract/leased labor. Listed on the Inc. 5000 as one of America’s fastest-growing, privately held companies and one of the top ten fastest-growing veteran owned business in the United States, Vector is proud to be certified by the National Veteran Business Development Council (NVBDC) and a recipient of the U.S. Department of Labor HIREVets Platinum Medallion Award for the recruitment, placement, and retention of veterans in the workforce.

Name: Ambiental Paraná
Description:
A Ambiental Paraná, por meio da Parceria Público-Privada com a Companhia de Saneamento do Paraná (Sanepar), é responsável pelos serviços de coleta e tratamento de esgoto em 52 municípios do estado a partir de 26 de janeiro de 2024. A empresa da Aegea Saneamento, líder no setor privado de saneamento básico no Brasil, irá atender, até 2033, mais de 600 mil pessoas na região Centro-Litoral do Paraná.

Ao lado da Sanepar, a Ambiental Paraná assume o compromisso de garantir, nas cidades atendidas, que o serviço de coleta e tratamento de esgoto chegue a 90% da população até 2033, meta estabelecida no Marco Legal do Saneamento Básico, proporcionando ainda mais saúde e qualidade de vida para a população.

Um total de R$1,1 bilhão serão investidos em obras de infraestrutura e melhorias no sistema de esgotamento sanitário nos 16 municípios, durante os 24 anos de contrato. Estão previstas ampliações e construções de novas Estações de Tratamento de Esgoto (ETE), Estações Elevatórias de Esgoto (EEE) e implantação de mais de 1.000 km de redes coletoras de esgoto.

Além da busca constante pela excelência dos serviços prestados, o compromisso da companhia é também com o desenvolvimento de programas e projetos com potencial de transformação social, que contribuam para elevar os índices de desenvolvimento humano das comunidades. Por isso, incentivamos ações, sempre em parceria com a Sanepar, que indiquem uma perspectiva de um amanhã mais sustentável.

Ambiental Paraná e Sanepar, unindo esforços para um futuro melhor aos paranaenses das cidades atendidas.

Name: Electrical Transmission & Distribution Partnership
Description:
The Electrical Transmission & Distribution (ET&D) Partnership is a formal collaboration of industry stakeholders dedicated to improving safety for workers in the electric line construction industry. Established in August 2004, it stands as one of the few national partnerships between employers and the Occupational Safety and Health Administration (OSHA).

Mission:
Analyze accident and incident data to identify common causes of fatalities, injuries, and illnesses among linemen, apprentices, and related job classifications.

Develop and promote Best Practices for each identified cause.

Implement strategies to encourage the adoption of these Best Practices among partners.

Identify and establish training criteria for various roles, including foremen, supervisors, linemen, and apprentices, to foster a culture that values safety and health.

Impact: By 2023, the Partnership encompassed 16 member organizations, covering an estimated 80% of workers in the line construction industry.

Name: Canadian Induracoat Corporation
Description:
Water is our most precious resource. The health of any community depends on a steady supply of clean and safe drinking water. An aging infrastructure however poses major challenges to water utilities ... and tight municipal budgets.

As pipes age, corrosion and tuberculation can affect water quality, restrict flow and cause pipe failure. Leaching of asbestos-cement pipes can cause matrix deterioration weakening the pipe structure. Replacing affected pipes is very costly and disrupts traffic and impacts the neighborhood for weeks.

As an authorized applicator in Canada for Resiline 320 Pipe Renewal Liner, Canadian lnduracoat Corporation (lnduracoat), can deliver a time and cost saving way to rehabilitate and extend the life of aging potable water pipe. 

The Resiline 320 cleaning and lining process is specifically designed to rehabilitate existing potable water mains, restoring pipes to near original diameter, restoring flow and efficiency and enhancing the pipe structure.
Resiline is the pipe lining division of Resimac Ltd., a UK based manufacturer of specialized coatings materials distributed around the globe. 

Resiline has a team of product development scientists with unparalleled knowledge and a combined industry experience of 94 years. This enables Resiline to develop innovative and unique materials to meet the demands of the water pipe lining industry.

Its unique features do not lie on its simplicity, but rather lie on the idea behind the product.

Name: JANDA ANLAGENBAU GmbH
Description:
Willkommen bei JANDA ANLAGENBAU GmbH

Ihrem zuverlässigen und langjährigen Partner für individuelle und innovative Lösungen im Bereich der Elektrotechnik. Wir sind ein erfahrenes und hochqualifiziertes Team von Elektroingenieuren aus Niederösterreich mit Zentrale in Herzogenburg sowie einer weiteren Betriebsstätte in Loosdorf.
Unser Ziel ist es, unseren Kunden maßgeschneiderte Lösungen zu bieten, die ihre individuellen Anforderungen erfüllen. Wir sind spezialisiert auf die Entwicklung, Planung und Umsetzung von elektrotechnischen Anlagen- und Ausrüstungen von Büro- und Wohngebäuden, von Geschäftslokalen und Einkaufszentren sowie in der Realisierung elektrotechnischer Lösungen am Industriesektor.
Ein weiterer Benefit ist unser Verkaufsgeschäft in Herzogenburg, in welchem wir hochwertige elektrotechnische Produkte zum Verkauf anbieten. Wir arbeiten nur mit renommierten Herstellern zusammen, um sicherzustellen, dass unsere Produkte von bester Qualität sind und den höchsten Standards entsprechen.
JANDA ANLAGENBAU GmbH begleitet sie von der Planung über die Umsetzung bis zur Abnahme Ihres Projekts. Für Wartungs- und Reparaturservices stehen wir Ihnen jederzeit zur Verfügung.
Wir legen großen Wert auf Qualität, Sicherheit und Umweltverträglichkeit. Deshalb verwenden wir nur hochwertige Materialien und modernste Technologien, um sicherzustellen, dass unsere Lösungen den höchsten Standards entsprechen. Unser Ziel ist es, eine optimale Effizienz und Zuverlässigkeit für unsere Kunden zu gewährleisten.
Wir arbeiten eng mit unseren Kunden zusammen, um ihre individuellen Anforderungen zu verstehen und maßgeschneiderte Lösungen zu entwickeln, die ihren Bedürfnissen entsprechen.
Bei JANDA ANLAGENBAU GmbH steht der Kunde im Mittelpunkt. Wir streben danach, unseren Kunden den bestmöglichen Service zu bieten und sicherzustellen, dass sie mit unseren Lösungen zufrieden sind.

Nossa missão é modernizar a gestão condominial através de soluções técnicas robustas que garantem segurança, conectividade e economia.

Infraestrutura de Redes: Cabeamento estruturado, organização de racks, certificação de pontos e implementação de fibra óptica.
Energia Solar Fotovoltaica: Projetos, instalação e homologação de sistemas para redução da conta de energia das áreas comuns.
Conectividade: Projetos de Wi-Fi de alta densidade para áreas comuns e salões de festas.
CFTV e Segurança: Instalação e manutenção de sistemas de monitoramento.
 CONHEÇA O PLANO PARTNER:
Desenvolvido especialmente para síndicos e administradoras que buscam tranquilidade, o Plano Partner é o nosso contrato de manutenção continuada.
Com ele, seu condomínio deixa de depender apenas de atendimentos emergenciais (corretivos) e passa a contar com:
Manutenção preventiva programada (evitando que equipamentos queimem ou a internet caia).
Prioridade no atendimento de chamados.
Relatórios técnicos mensais sobre a saúde da infraestrutura.
Redução de custos com trocas de equipamentos a longo prazo.
 ÁREA DE ATUAÇÃO:
Atendemos as Zonas Sul, Sudoeste, Oeste e Norte do Rio de Janeiro.
Transforme a infraestrutura do seu condomínio com quem entende do assunto.
 Entre em contato e agende uma visita técnica.

Name: UV Sifonik Sistemler Sanayi ve Ticaret Ltd Şti

Firmamız sifonik sistemin Türkiye'de yaygınlaşmasında çok büyük projelere imza atmış, bugüne kadar içerisinde Türkiye'nin en büyük stadyumları, havalimanları ve endüstri tesislerinin olduğu, alanı 7 milyon metrekareyi aşan projelere imza atmıştır.

UV, Fince’de ‘‘dolu kesit akış’’ (full-bore flow) anlamına gelen UmpiVirtaus kelimesinden gelir. Sifonik süzgeç dünyada ilk defa 1968 yılında Finlandiya’da Olavi Ebeling tarafından bulunmuş, Uv-System olarak süzgeç patentini 1968 yılında almıştır.

1972 yılında Per Sommerhein çalışmalara katılmış ve sistemin tüm dünyaya yayılmasını sağlamıştır. 50 yılı aşkın gelişme, çalışma ve deneylerin sonucu, Uv-System dizayn ve süzgeçleri ile tüm dünyada yaklaşık 100.000.000 m² alanının yağmur suyu drene edilmiştir.

Name: Conquest Engineering Llc
Description: Conquest Engineering LLC, is specialized in trench-less technologies and works with Horizontal Directional Drilling (HDD), is a steerable trenchless method that is utilized to install underground pipes, conduit, and cables along a designed bore path beneath various types of obstacles under constructed surfaces like parking lots, buildings, roads and other structures without digging trenches. This is an ideal method of installing utilities below surfaces that have already been occupied, minimizing environmental impact and disturbance of improved areas. Directional Boring is used when trenching or excavating is not practical. It is suitable for a variety of projects and allows infrastructure to be installed in areas inaccessible by traditional open-cut methods Currently, we have more than 4,000,000 feet of Directional Bore performed on several Telecommunication, Power and Gas Projects.

Name: NUCA of Western Michigan
Description:
Hello western Michigan utility contractors, excavators & industry suppliers - the move is on to form our own regional NUCA of Western Michigan Chapter! NUCA of Western Michigan will become the chartered chapter of the National Utility Contractors Association (NUCA) representing the utility & excavation contractors and industry suppliers in the western third of the state at the municipal, regional level, and state level. NUCA is the leading U.S. trade association working solely on behalf the utility construction and excavation industry contractors in the United States. Contact us at: nucawmi@nuca.com.
 
Chapter members will work together under the NUCA banner to advance the utility construction industry across the region, support the business success of our member companies, and the jobsite safety of their teams. As a members, you and your team will attend regional programs, network with fellow Chapter members, and even participate on the Chapter Board and/or committees. Your advocacy for the industry and the utility and excavation contractors that make it go in Western Michigan becomes #strongertogether as an aligned Chapter group, representing you interests to elected officials.

Your membership enables NUCA of Western Michigan to provide training programs, promote and elevate safety and workforce development in the state, and advocate for more favorable state/municipal laws and regulations impacting your business.

Over the years, the company has grown into a trusted provider of survey, supply, installation and commissioning services for powerlines, substations, underground reticulation and passive optical fibre links - including work under live line conditions, which remains one of Letacla’s key technical strengths. 

In 2000, the company launched its Technical Division, expanding further into consulting and project management. This broadened Letacla’s capabilities to deliver not only turnkey infrastructure, but also strategic support to both local and international clients. 

Letacla’s full product and service offering includes:
- Overhead powerlines 
- Substation Infrastructure  
- Underground cable systems 
- OPGW and ADSS fibre optic installations 
- Fibre and power infrastructure hardware, accessories and equipment 
- Full project lifecycle support - from design through to commissioning and 
   maintenance  

Letacla is proud to partner with SMMEs and BEE companies to deliver on our commitments and strengthen industry inclusion. 

Our business is driven by three core objectives: 
1. Serve our clients with expertise, service, and quality 
2. Support the development of our staff, ensuring continued skills growth 
3. Operate with trust, integrity, and responsibility, guided by a robust Quality 
    Management Plan 

With decades of experience and a reputation built on delivery, Letacla continues to power critical infrastructure across Africa.

Ние сме Екип, който е заедно от 20 години. Започнахме в „Софийска вода“, където натрупахме възможно най-сериозния опит. Когато бяхме готови, стартирахме нещо свое. Това е нашата фирма, нашата работа, с която се гордеем, защото ежедневно, освен целия си професионализъм, влагаме в нея сърце и душа.

Дейност
Фирма „Авариен Ремонт Строй“ EООД  проектира, доставя, инсталира и поддържа пакетни системи за пречистване на отпадъчни води, помпени станции, дренажи и дренажни системи, гравитачни канали, септични ями, запечатани изгребни ями, пречиствателни станции, главни канализационни връзки и системи за отводняване на повърхностни води за обслужване на жилищни имоти (от единични жилища до малки населени места). Това важи, както за нови, така и за съществуващи имоти, като жилищни комплекси, училища, институции, хотели, обществени домове и развлекателни комплекси и др.

Сериозният ни опит в областта на отводняването и използването на пакетирано оборудване ни осигурява ненадмината база, от която можем да предложим икономически ефективни и практични решения на проблемите с отвеждането на отпадъчните води.

Name: P&R Tech
Description:
In 1960, P&R Industries introduced the world’s best spherical power line markers, the Spanguard/Helimark, which power companies used to make their lines visible to pilots and birds. Our SpanGuard markers saved lives and protected equipment and were soon adopted by hundreds of utilities. Many of our original markers remain in service to this day, a testimony to their enduring quality.

Through the years we have improved our marker designs. Some of the more significant milestones include:

In the 1960s, we developed a method of installing the markers on power lines that ensures lifelong attachment without damaging the line.
In the early 1970s, we introduced our EHV (Extra High Voltage) markers that have a special coating and other features that protect them from line corona that can burn and melt other markers.
In the 1980s, we began making molded markers from high tech plastic material with the benefits of more brilliant color and longer life.
In the 1990s, we changed our name P&R Tech to reflect our diversification to other kinds of safety and energy efficient products for the utilities industry. Spanning the years to present day, these included a wide selection of bird diverters featuring the FireFly, as well as aluminum markers for high temperature/high voltage ACSS lines, LED obstruction lights, solar powered obstruction lights, thermal imaging for perimeter security, and more.
P&R Tech continues to be the world leader in power line markers and we remain committed to developing newer, greener products for our utility customers, always with the goal of “making life visibly safer”!

Name: Davis Plumbing Company
Description: Davis Plumbing Company Inc. unofficially started in 1974 when Ken Davis found an interest in plumbing and began as an apprentice at Scott Marbut Plumbing Company in Macon, Ga. Ken took a brief break from plumbing to work for Georgia Power Company on the Plant Scherer project. There he was the concrete superintendent until the project was completed. Ken continued his love for plumbing by spending every spare minute he had doing it. In 1982 Ken decided to reserve the company name Davis Plumbing Co., Inc. with the Georgia Secretary of State office, and continued to work with Georgia Power Co. full-time and plumb part time until 1989. At this point, Ken decided that his family and love for plumbing were more important and retired from Georgia Power Co. and Davis Plumbing Co. became a full-time career company. When Ken started working full time as self-employed entrepreneur, he just had himself, a pick-up truck and a bag full of tools. Ken has worked long days and nights, many weekends, and holidays to build the trust of the community and maintain a reputation of being an honest, hardworking, man that will give you the shirt off his back. These values are what Davis Plumbing Co. foundation are built on today, creating a name known for trust, honesty, and respect. Today Davis Plumbing Co. has become a second-generation company passed down to Ken's son, Will Davis. Davis Plumbing Company started with 1 employee in 1989, expanding in 2023 to 43  hardworking, honest, trusting, and respectful employees. State of Georgia Licenses Held by Davis Plumbing Co.

Name: ND Montage & Anlagenbau GmbH

ND Montage GmbH is a German industrial company specializing in industrial plant construction, piping systems, welding, and maintenance across Germany and Europe. With an experienced team and extensive expertise, the company provides planning, prefabrication, installation, maintenance, and personnel solutions. Combining technical know-how with flexibility, ND Montage delivers reliable, cost-efficient, and sustainable infrastructure for complex industrial projects.

Prefabrication & Installation
ND Montage supports clients from planning to commissioning. In-house prefabrication shortens installation time and ensures precision. Skilled teams work with steel, plastics, and GRP (glass fiber reinforced plastic) to build durable, high-quality systems. The company performs TIG, MAG, and orbital welding, ensuring strong and safe connections for all industrial systems.

Pipeline Systems
ND Montage designs, fabricates, and installs piping systems for water and energy plants, wastewater treatment, and chemical industries. From individual pipelines to large-scale networks, the company manages projects efficiently. All components meet strict European standards for quality and safety.

Storage Systems
The company provides WHG-compliant tanks and containers for chemicals, fuels, food, and pharmaceutical sectors. The range includes double-walled tanks, cooling units, pressure vessels, and hygienic storage systems — all customized to client specifications.

Maintenance & Service
ND Montage performs regular maintenance, repairs, and upgrades for industrial plants. Certified welders, technicians, and engineers ensure safe, efficient, and long-lasting operations.

Personnel Services
The company offers certified welders, pipe fitters, and assembly specialists for project-based work. This flexible staffing model allows companies to access skilled professionals without expanding permanent teams.

Name: IAB - Infrastruktur Anlagenbau, Montage & Service GmbH

Die IAB GmbH wurde im Jahr 2022 als eigenständiges Unternehmen aus dem bereits 2007 gegründeten IT-Haus der KJ Network GmbH im Bereich Infrastruktur ausgegliedert. Unsere Ausgliederung erfolgte mit dem klaren Ziel, den spezifischen Anforderungen von Versorgungsunternehmen und großen Auftraggebern gerecht zu werden und unsere herausragenden Kernkompetenzen noch besser zur Geltung zu bringen.

Gemeinsam arbeiten wir daran, maßgeschneiderte Lösungen zu entwickeln, die den individuellen Anforderungen unserer Kunden gerecht werden.

Unser Fokus liegt darauf, eine nahtlose Integration von Technologie, Prozessen und Infrastruktur zu gewährleisten, um effiziente und zukunftssichere Lösungen bereitzustellen. Wir verstehen die Bedeutung einer robusten und zuverlässigen Infrastruktur für den Erfolg eines Unternehmens und setzen alles daran, unseren Kunden die bestmögliche Leistung und Qualität zu bieten.

Bei der IAB GmbH stehen Kundenorientierung, Innovation und exzellenter Service im Mittelpunkt unserer Unternehmensphilosophie. Wir streben danach, langfristige Partnerschaften aufzubauen und unseren Kunden nachhaltige Mehrwerte zu bieten.

Kontaktieren Sie uns, um mehr über unser Unternehmen und unsere breite Palette an Infrastruktur-Lösungen zu erfahren. Wir freuen uns darauf, mit Ihnen zusammenzuarbeiten und Sie bei Ihren Infrastrukturprojekten zu unterstützen.

Nos dedicamos a brindar soluciones de infraestructura al comercio y la Industria 

Montamos estructuras modulares y las comercializamos para venta y alquiler. 


Las estructuras son fabricadas bajo los más altos estándares de calidad. Usan principalmente el Aluminio como material de fabricación, lo que las dota de amplias ventajas respecto a soluciones tradicionales, como son:
1.Menor peso (lo que la vuelve una estructura asísmica y de bajo costo de transporte).
2.De muy baja corrosión (excelentes para su uso en la costa).
3.Todos los materiales cumplen con las normas europeas de exposición al fuego (DIN 4102/B1,M2).
4.De muy rápido montaje (hasta 1,000 m2 por día).
5.No requieren de mayores obras civiles para su montaje (no hay mayores trabajos de cimentación, no se requiere de trabajos de soldadura).
6.El techo puede ser transparente, semitransparente u opaco (lo que permite aprovechar la luz del dia pero con filtración de los rayos UV al 100%).
7.Mínimo mantenimiento.
8.Estructura modular (crece orgánicamente de acuerdo a lo que necesitas).
9.100% desmontable, te la puedes llevar a cualquier lugar sin perder tu inversión (ideal para estructuras montadas sobre terrenos alquilados).
10.Gran variedad de materiales para ser usados como paredes laterales como : PVC flexible, ABS, Vidrio transparente u oscurecido, chapa metálica, panel sandwich con aislamiento.

- Self-Drilling Anchors (İbobulon),

La Diputación Provincial de Soria coordina Construyendo Maderaula y cuenta con la participación de la Fundación Cesefor, la organización Forest Stewardship Council (FSC España), la Asociación Forestal de Soria (Asfoso), el Clúster del Hábitat Eficiente (Aeice) y el Instituto de Tecnología de la Construcción (ITEC). Construyendo Maderaula cuenta con el apoyo de la Fundación Biodiversidad del Ministerio para la Transición Ecológica y el Reto Demográfico (MITECO) en el marco del Plan de Recuperación, Transformación y Resiliencia (PRTR), financiado por la Unión Europea-NextGenerationEU.

Name: Phoenix Boring
Description:
Phoenix Boring Inc. is redefining underground infrastructure with innovative trenchless technologies that are transforming how construction projects are executed. Our mission is to provide efficient, cost-effective, and environmentally sustainable solutions for the installation of pipelines and other underground utilities. By challenging the traditional methods of open-cut excavation, we aim to minimize surface disruption, reduce environmental impact, and significantly lower project costs.

With over a decade of expertise in the trenchless industry, our team has developed proprietary technologies, including our cutting-edge Assisted Dynamic Boring (ADB) platform and the newly launched PyroHDD, a steerable, small-diameter multi-modal drilling head. These innovations enable us to tackle the most challenging ground conditions, outperforming conventional methods both technically and economically.

At Phoenix Boring, we are driven by our commitment to excellence and innovation. Our solutions are designed to adapt to any project requirements, from complex urban environments to remote installations. Our multi-tool trenchless platform not only reduces costs but also opens new possibilities for applications previously limited to expensive, specialized equipment.

As tech-enabled construction company, we bring a competitive edge in both public and private sectors, leveraging our certifications and industry partnerships to secure projects and deliver unparalleled results. We’re proud of our track record of success, including the completion of critical infrastructure projects ahead of schedule in California.

Phoenix Boring Inc. is at the forefront of transforming the underground infrastructure industry, combining technical expertise with groundbreaking innovation. Join us as we lead the way to a more sustainable, efficient, and resilient future.
