Originally, UPI was granted the government approval for the business of maintenance and services for copper smelter and refinery industries and approved business location is limited in Gresik District, East Java Province Indonesia.

Since its establishment, UPI has grown and expanded its business not only for maintenance of copper smelter and refinery industries but also for sophisticated industries including rectification and modification works of other machinery and factories, in order to keep the wheels of plants operations moving with focus on refractory, mechanical, piping and corrosion maintenance.

In April 1999, UPI was granted the approval for the business of maintenance, engineering consultancy and construction services for machinery of copper smelter refinery, chemical, petrochemical and other industries from the Minister of Investment/Chairman of Investment Coordinating Board (BKPM) all over Indonesia.

UPI has established a quality management system in plant maintenance to assure quality of our services to clients. It fully complies with ISO 9001 : 2015 and also certified SMK3 from Ministry of Manpower of Republic Indonesia.

Le attività secondarie esercitate dalla G.S. Impianti S.r.L. sono le seguenti:

Lavori di manutenzione giardini e verde pubblico.

Lavori stradali.
La G.S. Impianti S.r.L. è iscritta e certificata presso la SOA Mediterranea S.p.A. con la categoria OG10 Classifica III-Bis per l’esecuzione di lavori pubblici.

L’impresa è altresì abilitata all’installazione, alla trasformazione, all’ampliamento e alla manutenzione degli impianti di cui all’Art. 1 del Decreto n. 37/2008 per le lettere: A – B – C – D – G .

Name: Mineral Products International
Description:
Les origines de la société MPI remontent à 1975, date à laquelle un propriétaire de carrières soucieux de valoriser les sous-produits de ses exploitations décide de financer le développement et la mise au point d’un matériau de synthèse constitué principalement de minéraux broyés.

Son projet aboutit en octobre 1985 à la création de la société MPI qui a pour objet social la fabrication et la commercialisation d’éléments moulés en pierre de synthèse. La production présentait à l’origine un caractère relativement artisanal, mais l’entreprise a, depuis lors, fortement évolué.

En effet, en 2007, MPI quitte son site historique de Soumagne, où elle disposait d’une surface de travail d’environ 6 000 m² et d’équipements peu automatisés, pour s’installer dans le zoning de Barchon dans des bâtiments d’une superficie totale de 12 000 m². Elle en profite pour s’équiper de machines de traitement beaucoup plus performantes afin d’être en mesure de répondre de manière plus professionnelle, plus efficace et plus rapide à une demande croissante et de plus en plus diversifiée.

Aujourd’hui, forts de notre expérience nous veillons à améliorer continuellement la qualité de nos produits et processus, afin de livrer à nos clients des composants qui répondent aux plus hautes exigences techniques et esthétiques, tout en respectant les budgets et délais impartis.

Description:

We also work well in teaming up and assisting other contractors in large-scale and dynamic infrastructure projects. Our strength is
in the passion of our people. Our people’s passion is to help you get your job done seamlessly. Diverse Infrastructure strives to be the best strategic partner across industries that keep our country running, producing, and prospering.

Diverse Infrastructure provides portable generator rentals for construction companies, general contractors, subcontractors, and property restoration and remediation services. Our experienced sales and project management teams deliver turnkey design and rental solutions for companies requiring generator rentals to ensure constant power for equipment at your job site.

We rent portable generators, and all the associated interface peripherals, across a spectrum of power requirements ranging from 20kW up to 2MW,  adequate for most jobs and up to 9MW where required. We also offer load banks of all sizes both resistive and reactive.

Diverse Infrastructure provides temperature and humidity control solutions for a broad range of customer demands including those resulting from natural disasters.

NO JOB TO LARGE OR SMALL!

Para isso trabalha com planejamento estratégico, inovação tecnológica e na melhoria do relacionamento com seus clientes.

A empresa atua hoje como concessionária dos serviços de saneamento em uma área de 4.000 hectares, regulada pela Lei Municipal nº 1651, de 13 de julho de 2001, onde está inserido o Bairro Alphaville Lagoa dos Ingleses em Nova Lima – Minas Gerais, buscando sempre inovações, através de uma forte política de treinamentos, investimentos em novas tecnologias e controle das operações.

Especializada em gestão da água, ela desenvolve, implementa e controla sistemas de saneamento básico em todas as suas fases: captação, tratamento e distribuição de água, além da coleta e tratamento de esgoto. Para a Samotracia, investir em saneamento é mais do que um compromisso com o bem-estar social e a preservação ambiental. É uma filosofia empresarial que reflete muito bem a nossa realidade.

Name: APG, Inc.
Description:
APG, a Willdan Company, provides practical, innovative, and customized electric power solutions for developers, owners, and operators of data centers, energy resources, and other commercial utility-scale projects. Our expertise is electric substations, microgrids, and energy resources, including solar Photovoltaic (PV) arrays, Battery Energy Storage Systems (BESS), EV charging stations, generators, and fuel cells. 

We're more than an Engineer, Procure, Construct firm. We're an EPC+. We offer Consulting and Design at the beginning when your project is just a doodle and — after Engineering, Procuring, and Constructing — we provide Commissioning and Start-up services to make sure your project gets up and running. And then, once it's up and running, we provide Operations and Maintenance (O&M) services to make sure it continues to run smoothly. 

We can take your data center, energy resources project, or microgrid from concept to concrete to constant connection. Our team has helped develop the North American electric grid, including: 
     180 substations from 25 kV to 345 kV,
         including 2.3 GW for AI data center substations 
     3100 MW of energy resources
        * 700 MW of BESS 
        * 1600 MW of solar PV power
        * 800 MW of wind power
     28 microgrids, many with Electric Vehicle (EV) charging stations
     50 commercial and governmental O&M sites

We have relationships throughout the U.S. and Canada with 
* 95% of investor-owned and many municipal and cooperative utilities
*  all Independent System Operators
*  all major equipment manufacturers, and 
*  many contractors. 

We have a proven track record of meeting contractual obligations, exceeding customer expectations, and putting safety first in the electrical power industry. We have had zero reportable safety incidents to date. 

APG, a Willdan Company
Interconnecting from concept to concrete to constant connection

Name: Küpfer & Fils SA
Description:
Depuis 1947, Küpfer & Fils SA est une entreprise familiale suisse spécialisée dans l’assainissement, le nettoyage et l’entretien des infrastructures de canalisations et de voirie. Fondée à Bex (VD) avec une présence également à Martigny (VS), l’entreprise s’est forgée une solide réputation dans le domaine des interventions techniques : hydrocurage, vidange, nettoyage à très haute pression, résine/chemisage, nettoyage de routes et traitement des déchets et transport de matières dangereuses et et produits chimiques.

Notre offre s’adresse tant aux particuliers, aux professionnels, aux industries qu’aux collectivités dans le domaine du curage et vidange des canalisations, inspection caméra pour un diagnostic fiable des réseaux, nettoyage de fosses septiques, fosses à graisse et fosses de relevage,
nettoyage de sites industriels et de voiries, incluant l’enlèvement de graffitis et l’entretien urbain grâce à notre balayeuse spécialisée. 
Services de dépannage et d’intervention d’urgence 24h/24, 7j/7.

L’expertise de Küpfer & Fils repose sur une approche alliant qualité, réactivité et respect des normes environnementales. Chaque intervention est réalisée avec des méthodes modernes et performantes, dans un souci constant de durabilité et de sécurité pour ses équipes et pour les tiers.

Nous sommes à votre écoute pour étudier vos besoins, notre équipe se fera un plaisir de vous renseigner et de vous proposer une solution sur mesure. N’hésitez pas à nous contacter.

Description:
Idaho Falls Power is a municipal electric utility serving the city of Idaho Falls, Idaho. Since 1900, our mission has been to deliver low-cost electricity to residents and businesses. Idaho Falls owns and operates five hydropower plants that deliver about one-third of the city’s electricity needs.

In addition to the generation and transmission of electricity to homes and businesses, Idaho Falls Power offers a number of programs and services that benefit customers and the community. This includes the Idaho Falls Fiber Optic Network, which delivers high-speed, affordable, internet capability for homes and businesses.

Name: Mast Gruppo
Description:
Mast è un gruppo societario strutturato in business units specifiche, nate con l’intento di garantire soluzioni dedicate ed integrate, ciascuna focalizzata su una specifica tipologia di attività: costruzione di impianti sportivi outdoor e indoor; opere edili di finitura; costruzioni edili con formula "chiavi in mano".


Mast Sport

Omologati da federazioni sportive nazionali ed internazionali, gli impianti sportivi di MAST Sport propongono i migliori sistemi per manti in erba sintetica, pavimenti sportivi, piste d’atletica, coperture e opere edili complementari.
Dal 2011 Mast Sport è Official Partner Limonta Sport Spa, produttore di erba sintetica dal 1979, leader internazionale nel settore, che porta con sè l’esperienza e la tradizione del gruppo Limonta, storica azienda tessile fondata in Italia più di 100 anni fa. L’unico produttore italiano Fifa Preferred Producer, sottolineando la leadership dell’azienda nel mercato Internazionale.


Mast Finiture

è la divisione storica, nata dalla collaborazione continua e consolidata nel tempo con partner selezionati, specializzata nella realizzazione di pavimentazioni, rivestimenti, edilizia prefabbricata a secco, soluzioni acustiche ed antincendio. 
Con un'attenzione specifica alle esigenze dell'ambito ospedaliero, scolastico, alberghiero, commerciale, industriale e aeroportuale, Mast Finiture opera in quest'ambito con una stretta collaborazione e selezione delle migliori industrie europee del settore.


Mast General Contractor

si è sviluppata negli anni per consentire al committente di avere un solo interlocutore per le opere strutturali, impiantistiche e di completamento.
Per le opere strutturali, impiantistiche e di completamento, MAST General Contractor consegna l'opera finita con la formula "chiavi in mano", svolgendo il ruolo di contraente generale, fungendo da interfaccia unico per il cliente finale e rispondendo in prima persona dalla progettazione, all'esecuzione, fino alla gestione post appalto.

Description:
GeoDrill are renowned as experts in the field of Geothermal Drilling and Site Investigation, offering precision drilling and exceptional customer care at every stage of the process. Established in 2006, GeoDrill has evolved and expanded into being considered, by most, as the market leader in the United Kingdom for geothermal drilling and closed-loop installations. Our journey started with a single drilling rig nearly two decades ago, and today, we proudly operate 12 drilling rigs in the field, with plans for additional rigs for 2025 and beyond. 

As sustainable energy takes centre stage in shaping the future, we are primed to lead the charge in delivering innovative drilling solutions for the renewable energy sector. With a wealth of experience and unrivalled knowledge GeoDrill has been successfully delivering affordable heating and cooling for both commercial and domestic properties since 2006 - because renewable energy is the only choice for the future.

a leading supplier of industrial noise protection.

Your contact in our Sales Department will be a competent and qualified professional engineer with many years experience in acoustic engineering.
Equipped with modern 3D CAD software, the Construction and Processing Department is your link between sales engineers and manufacturing. Production is carried out by highly qualified experts working on the most modern sheet metal processing machines.

Not only is BBM Akustik Technologie DIN EN ISO 9001-certified, it is also specialized in supplying, engineering and manufacturing custom-made solutions and products that are always state-of-the-art.

Name: XKIG
Description:
XKIG is a national leader in critical infrastructure services for the power and gas utility sectors, specializing in the development and maintenance of rights-of-way; the construction, upgrade, and upkeep of transmission and distribution systems; vegetation management; and disaster restoration.

Headquartered in Norfolk, Virginia, with a legacy spanning over 50 years, XKIG operates through its subsidiaries – Xylem Tree Experts, Kendall Vegetation Services, and River City Construction – to support the safe, reliable delivery of energy across the United States. Together, these companies maintain and protect essential utility infrastructure, ensuring operational continuity for millions of Americans.

When natural disasters strike, XKIG’s rapid-response teams are among the first on the ground, restoring critical services and strengthening community resilience. Driven by an unwavering commitment to the communities it serves, XKIG combines next-generation technologies, uncompromising safety standards, and industry-leading workforce retention to deliver operational excellence at scale.

Name: Econo Energies Solutions
Description:
EconoEnergies Solutions - Transformando Desafios Energéticos em Oportunidades Sustentáveis

Na EconoEnergies Solutions, transformamos desafios energéticos em oportunidades de economia e sustentabilidade. Oferecemos soluções inovadoras e personalizadas para reduzir custos com energia elétrica e otimizar a gestão de recursos energéticos.

Nossos Serviços
Eficiência Energética - Realizamos estudos detalhados para identificar oportunidades de redução de consumo e custos, garantindo um retorno rápido sobre o investimento.

Consultoria para Migração ao Mercado Livre - Ajudamos nossos clientes a migrar para o mercado livre de energia, proporcionando maior controle sobre custos e acesso a tarifas mais competitivas.

Soluções em Energia Solar
Oferecemos:

1. Implantação de Usinas Solares: Projetamos, instalamos e operamos usinas solares.
2. Energia Solar por Assinatura: Energia solar sem necessidade de infraestrutura própria, através de um modelo de assinatura flexível.

Recuperação de Créditos Fiscais - Especializamo-nos na recuperação de créditos fiscais associados às faturas de energia elétrica, ajudando nossos clientes a recuperar valores significativos.

Consultoria para Distribuidoras de Energia Elétrica

Alocação Otimizada de Capex e Opex: Desenvolvemos estratégias para a alocação eficiente de despesas de capital e operacionais.

Gestão de Ativos: Implementamos práticas avançadas para maximizar a vida útil e o desempenho dos ativos das distribuidoras.

Incremento de Base de Ativos para Revisão Tarifária: Apoiamos na otimização da base de ativos para processos de revisão tarifária.

Projetos de Insourcing e Outsourcing: Oferecemos consultoria para implementação de projetos de insourcing e outsourcing.

Valuation de Projetos Estratégicos: Realizamos avaliações detalhadas de projetos estratégicos, fornecendo insights valiosos para a tomada de decisões.

Name: VR AG
Description:
Ein idealer Partner
Die VR AG ist seit 1990 erfolgreich in der Verkehrsregelungstechnik als unabhängiges Schweizer Unternehmen tätig. 
Mit ihren qualitativ hochstehenden Produkten sowie Dienstleistungen hält die VR AG den Strassenverkehr im optimalen Fluss und sorgt für tägliche Sicherheit auf dem Strassennetz. Zu ihrem Leistungsangebot gehören die Realisierung und Wartung von einfachen Fussgänger-Lichtsignalanlagen bis hin zu komplexen und koordinierten Verkehrssteuergeräten und Softwarelösungen. Im Laufe der Jahre konnte sich die VR AG dank ihres grossen und stetig wachsenden Know-Hows als das führende Unternehmen im Schweizer Markt der Verkehrsregelungstechnik etablieren.

Our Vision

Sustainability: Our projects are designed to minimize environmental impact while maximizing durability and efficiency.

Safety First: With a strong focus on safety, we uphold the highest standards in every project, ensuring the well-being of our workforce and the communities we serve.

At Robert B. Somerville Utilities, we don't just build infrastructure; we build the future. 
Connect with us to learn how we can help you power your next project.

Name: Groupe SOLICE
Description:
Le groupe SOLICE, avec ses entités INPAL, WANNITUBE et EFFICAL est leader dans l'ingénierie des réseaux, la conception, la fabrication et la mise en œuvre de tubes et accessoires pré-isolés, à destination des réseaux de chaleur et de froid en milieu urbain.

INPAL dispose d’une usine de production moderne située en Moselle, et est aujourd’hui le seul fabricant français de tubes et d’accessoires pré-isolés. 
WANNITUBE, spécialisé dans l’ingénierie et les travaux, propose des solutions clés en main pour la mise en œuvre des tubes et accessoires pré-isolés des réseaux.
EFFICAL, est en charge de la conception, fabrication et fourniture de sous stations d'échange thermique à destination des réseaux de chauffage urbain.

La société couvre l’intégralité du territoire français et exporte en Europe depuis plus de 30 ans. Solice est le partenaire des plus grands opérateurs de l'énergie et acteur de la transition énergétique.

Name: ITC Integrated Solutions
Description:
ITC offers system integration services in addition to being a contractor. we deliver system integration services. This can be a single piece of equipment, an automated system, a comprehensive control solution, or a fully integrated facility.

ITC has a wide range of internal skills and experience that enable it to easily handle massive, complex projects, complete small projects at a low cost, and do both while providing the highest level of value.

Essa parceria fortaleceu nossa presença junto às maiores concessionárias e geradoras de energia elétrica do país, reforçando nossa vocação de ser um parceiro estratégico em projetos estruturantes para o desenvolvimento nacional.

Nosso time é formado por profissionais altamente qualificados, comprometidos com a excelência técnica e o cumprimento rigoroso de prazos, além da observância às normas de segurança e sustentabilidade. A cada projeto, reafirmamos nosso propósito de contribuir para o crescimento do Brasil, conectando energia e construindo um futuro melhor

Medidores de Agua Avanzados: Ultramedición ofrece una amplia gama de medidores de agua de última generación, utilizando tecnologías innovadoras como la lectura remota, la integración IoT y la medición precisa en tiempo real. Estos dispositivos no solo permiten una recolección de datos más eficiente, sino que también ayudan a detectar y prevenir pérdidas de agua.

Soluciones Integrales en Gestión del Dato: Más allá de la simple venta de medidores, Ultramedición proporciona soluciones completas en gestión del dato de lectura. Esto incluye plataformas de software personalizadas que facilitan la recopilación, análisis y presentación de datos, permitiendo a los clientes tomar decisiones informadas para la gestión óptima de sus recursos hídricos.

Consultoría Especializada: El equipo de Ultramedición cuenta con expertos en el ámbito de la gestión del agua, brindando servicios de consultoría para ayudar a los clientes a implementar soluciones adaptadas a sus necesidades específicas. Desde la planificación hasta la ejecución, Ultramedición se compromete a guiar a sus clientes en la adopción exitosa de tecnologías innovadoras.

Jesteśmy firmą, która zajmuje sie budową sieci wod-kan i drogowym. Dysponujemy potencjałem technicznym i osobowym umożliwiającym realizację najbardziej wymagających inwestycji.

Posiadamy wykwalifikowaną i doświadczoną kadrę -4 brygad wyposażonych we własny sprzęt w postaci koparek, koparko-ładowarek oraz wywrotek.

Dysponujemy również własnym transportem niskopodwoziowym, systemami szalunków, oraz sprzętem odwadniającym.

Jesteśmy przygotowani sprzętowo do wykonywania przecisków pod przeszkodami przy użyciu wibromłota. Nasza wiedza i umiejętności jak również wieloletnie doświadczenie umożliwiają szybkie i sprawne wykonanie prac objętych przedmiotem zamówienia.

Realizujemy inwestycje na terenie województw wielkopolskiego, łódzkiego i kujawsko -pomorskiego. W przeszłości wykonywaliśmy podziemne zbiorniki retencyjne o pojemności ponad 2000 m3, rurociągi o średnicach do 1500 mm w konstrukcji tworzywowej jak i betonowej.

Wykonywaliśmy przebudowy i budowy wodociągów o średnicach do 630 wykonywane na czynnych sieciach oraz przebudowy kanałów ogólnospławnych z rozdziałem na sieci sanitarne i deszczowe z zapewnieniem ciągłości odbioru ścieków.

Name: THE PUMP MAN - Kappus Well Pump & Water System Services
Description:
The Pump Man – KAPPUS WELL PUMP & WATER SYSTEM SERVICES

Since 1910, Kappus has helped families and property owners across the Hudson Valley stay supplied with clean, pressurized well water. Now operating as The Pump Man, we’re a fourth-generation, family-owned business specializing in emergency well pump repair, pressure tank installation, custom water filtration systems, and full private well system design.

We serve Putnam, Dutchess, Westchester, Orange, and Rockland counties with fast, honest, and professional service. Whether your water has suddenly stopped or you’ve been dealing with issues like low pressure, high iron, rotten egg smells, or bacteria, our experienced team will diagnose the problem and fix it right — the first time.

 Our Core Services Include:
• Emergency well pump diagnostics and replacements

Name: Alligator Bayou Industries
Description:
Alligator Bayou Industries is a strategic asset management and supply partner specializing in the Internet Service Provider (ISP) and utility sectors. We address two primary financial challenges: high capital expenditure (CapEx) for critical infrastructure and inefficient inventory management.

Our Core Value Proposition:

Cost Reduction: We significantly reduce client CapEx by supplying vital Outside Plant (OSP) materials (fiber, conduit, hardware) at below-market rates through our alternative supply network.

Capital Reclamation: We facilitate the liquidation of clients' obsolete and surplus inventory, turning clutter that is "off-design" and taking up valuable warehouse space into reclaimed cash flow.

Building a Resilient Network:

Beyond transactional supply, we are committed to building a resilient resource network that connects utility providers with similar infrastructure designs. This network is designed to facilitate rapid mutual aid and supply sharing during regional crises or large-scale fiber buildouts, ensuring project continuity and community connectivity when it is needed most.

We provide end-to-end logistics, ensuring 100% on-time, damage-free delivery from acquisition to final destination.

Our role is to find land, purchase it, study the economic viability of the project and formalize and develop the concept of the "masterplan" in architecture and urban planning, and register government permits and environmental licenses. And then we are responsible for the more structural part of the architectural work, such as electrical, hydraulic, structural installations, and finally the 100% complete construction of the real estate project.

Our goal is to promote real estate housing taking into account the criteria of sustainable development. To achieve this goal, we can carry out any real estate transaction, and acquisition, construction, management, administration and sale of all properties, participation in the real estate market. We work in architecture specializing in sustainable construction design, leading projects from the initial concept to delivery. Енергоаудит об'єктів різного призначення з метою зменшення витрат на енергоспоживання, теплопостачання, технологічні процеси.

Проектування водогрійних та парових котелень на будь-якому виді палива, систем альтернативної енергетики, систем повітряного та променистого опалення, теплопунктів, інженерних мереж, систем газопостачання.

Будівництво, реконструкція та монтаж теплотехнічного та енергетичного обладнання: водогрійних та парових котелень, що працюють на різних видах палива, систем повітряного та променистого опалення, теплопунктів, інженерних мереж, систем газопостачання.

Автоматизацію та впровадження IT-рішень у сфері енергозбереження, що забезпечує контроль та моніторинг за роботою теплотехнічного обладнання. Це забезпечує автоматичну обробку даних та формування зведеного звіту функціонування обладнання в режимі он-лайн;

Сервісне обслуговування теплотехнічного та енергетичного обладнання, водогрійних та парових котелень, що працюють на будь-якому виді палива, систем теплопостачання.

Продаж теплотехнічного обладнання. ТОВ «Промбудтепло» є офіційним імпортером продукції ТМ ICI Caldaie S.p.A., одного зі світових лідерів з виробництва промислового теплотехнічного та енергетичного обладнання: водогрійних котлів та котлів на перегрітій воді потужністю до 20 МВт, котлів на діатермічному маслі до 10 МВт, парових продуктивністю пари до 25 тн/год, конденсаційних котлів.

Name: ENTROBYTE
Description:
Rodney Glen Matcham is a development manager with over 10 years of experience in planning and executing projects using imagery.
 He has a strong background in remote sensing, GIS, and data analysis, as well as project management, communication, and leadership skills. He is proficient in using various satellite and aerial imagery sources, such as Landsat, Sentinel, and Nearmap, to map and monitor urban and rural environments, identify land use patterns, assess environmental impacts, and support disaster response and relief operations. He is also skilled in using software tools such as ArcGIS, QGIS, Google Earth, and EOS Data Analytics to process, visualize, and interpret imagery data and generate spatial products and reports.

As a development manager, Rodney Glen Matcham is responsible for the following tasks:

Analyze and create project scope and milestones for several company initiatives using imagery FOR SITES OF PROJECTS FOR MINING , POWER LINES, ROADS , 
Manage the handling and assigning of daily tasks within the company
Hold regular meetings with all departments to ensure open communication and expectations throughout a project
Address customer concerns in reference to products, services rendered or employee interactions
Actively seek to resolve any concerns while adhering to the company policy and standards of behavior
Ensure proper communication concerning changes in established milestones or challenges that may affect the outcome of a project’s completion date
Communicate and organize with team members to increase the company’s outreach
Strategize and plan fundraising events
Rodney Glen Matcham has a bachelor’s degree in Project Management from the University of Pretoria . He has worked as a development manager for several organizations, such as Google AI Ghana1, EOS Data Analytics2, and Nearmap3, where he led and participated in various projects using imagery across the African continent.
